properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's not the first mile that you'll be judged by, For you may stumble along the way; But you'll grow stronger in faith and courage As Jesus walks with you from day to day.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's not the first mile that's so important It's the last mile when day is done. Then you'll see Jesus in all His splendor, And He will have for you the crown you've won.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Upon this journey from earth to heaven You'll have to watch for the tempter's snare; Just keep on praying to your Redeemer, He will protect you with His loving care.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There may be times when you have a burden That grows too heavy along the road; If you will let Him, the blessed Savior Will be so glad to bear your heavy load.
